features: AA/AAA: The LLOYTRON Ultra Fast Smart AA / AAA Home Battery Charger is compatible with NiMh Rechargeable batteries in sizes AA and AAA. Charge 1 to 4 batteries at one time (dependent on battery size).

SMART AND EASY TO OPERATE: The built-in microprocessor provides an LED Status shoing when a battery is charging or fully charged for each battery. RED LED indicates charging or battery error and GREEN LED shows fully charged. Simply plug in to a standard UK mains socket and insert your rechargeable batteries into the appropriate sized compartment.

QUICK RECHARGE: Recharge your batteries to their full capacity quickly and safely. The charging rate for AA is 1.2v DC 1800mA (1 battery), 900mA (2 batteries), 450mA (3 batteries) or 450mA (4 batteries) and for AAA is 1.2v DC 900mA (1 battery), 250mA (2 batteries), 225mA (3 batteries) or 225mA (4 batteries).

DURABLE: Many rechargeable batteries can be recharged up to 1000 times, providing long lasting power to your everyday devices again and again. Save money and reduce waste without the need for disposable batteries.
BUILT-IN SAFETY FEATURES: The over charge protection and reverse polarity protection/automatic short circuit protects the battery against current fluctuation for safe operation.
description: The LLOYTRON Ultra Fast Smart AA / AAA LCD Home Battery Charger is compatible with many battery sizes and will charge up to 4 AA or AAA sized batteries. Rechareable NiMh batteries can be charged; save money and reduce waste without the need for disposable batteries. The intelligent microprocessor with LCD display screen shows an individual status display for each battery to determine how charged it is. Recharge your batteries to their full capacity quickly and safely. Simply plug in to a standard UK mains socket and insert your rechargeable batteries into the appropriate sized compartment. The LED indiactors will advise a RED LED during charging or battery error and GREEN LED when fully charged for each individual battery. Once fully charged the LED status will change to GREEN. To calculate the charging time the battery capacity must be divided by the charging rate and so is dependent on the batteries you require. The charging rate for AA is 1.2v DC 1800mA (1 battery), 900mA (2 batteries), 450mA (3 batteries) or 450mA (4 batteries) and for AAA is 1.2v DC 900mA (1 battery), 250mA (2 batteries), 225mA (3 batteries) or 225mA (4 batteries). This durable battery charger is long lasting to give power to your family's devices time and again, with many batteries able to recharge up to 1000 times. The safety features such as over charge protection and reverse polarity protection/automatic short circuit protects the battery against current fluctuation, although it is advised not to leave batteries charging for over double the amount of time they require to reach full charge. Batteries not included. Package Includes: 1 x LLOYTRON Ultra Fast Smart AA / AAA LCD Home Battery Charger 1x Instruction Manual
